CREATE TABLE user
(
id INT NOT NULL,
name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
password VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL
);
INSERT INTO user (111, 'jane', SHA5('password');

CREATE TABLE db1.user (id int, name VARCHAR(100), password VARCHAR(50));
